data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Limits cognitive load by simplifying choices for users.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation and focused product displays.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design that facilitates easy accessibility of commonly used actions.
data.technical_spec: Prominently placed 'Buy Now' and 'Add to Cart' buttons.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: User interfaces are designed to be aesthetically pleasing to improve perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent font, color schemes, and whitespace usage.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design aligns with user expectations based on other familiar platforms.
data.technical_spec: Standardized UI patterns known from industry leaders.

data.title: Visibility of System Status
data.description: The system keeps users informed about what is happening.
